title: GTM Regulatory Outlook — Americas — Q2 FY2026 (May – July 2026)
summary: The Americas enters the most concentrated regulatory implementation period in crypto history.

regulators.full: Securities & Exchange Commission / Commodity Futures Trading Commission / Financial Crimes Enforcement Network / Office of the Comptroller of the Currency
regulators.focus: GENIUS Act implementation, BSA/AML reform, stablecoin rulemaking, DeFi enforcement

regulators.focus: VASP reporting requirements, crypto securities framework
